what_it_does: Records metadata for an image attachment in the design-source channel, referencing the image asset at image://design-source/capital-raise/p-28.
observations: The file consists only of YAML frontmatter with no body content.
It declares an attachment id att-e452a351.
The channel is design-source and the attachment_type is images.
The target uses an image:// URI pointing to design-source/capital-raise/p-28.
An added timestamp of 2026-06-22T11:30:59.397245+00:00 is present.
standouts: References a specific image asset p-28 under capital-raise in the design-source channel.
Uses a custom image:// URI scheme for the target.
conventions: Uses id, channel, attachment_type, target, and added fields.
Target URI uses a channel-scoped image:// scheme.
notes: A minimal, timestamped ledger entry that links the design-source channel to a specific image attachment.
questions: What does p-28 represent within capital-raise?
How is the image:// URI resolved or stored?
Who added this attachment and for what specific design purpose?
purpose_vs_actual: The stated purpose of recording an attachment matches the content; it is a metadata reference to an image asset.
intention_signals: It appears intended to create a durable, discoverable record associating a channel with a specific image asset for design context.
novelty: Use of an image:// URI scheme for attachment targets.
contribution: Provides a precise, timestamped attachment reference that a fused system can use to locate and associate the image asset with the design-source channel.
summary_for_embedding: A YAML-frontmatter attachment ledger entry identifying an images-type attachment in the design-source channel pointing to image://design-source/capital-raise/p-28, recorded on 2026-06-22.
intention_for_embedding: To catalog and make discoverable an image attachment tied to the design-source channel's capital-raise asset set.
